name: GIGABYTE Z790 Eagle AX LGA 1700 Intel Z790 ATX Motherboard
highlights: GIGABYTE Z790 ATX Motherboard delivers cutting-edge performance for 14th, 13th, and 12th Gen Intel® Core™ processors with support for DDR5 memory up to 7600MHz (OC)
description: GIGABYTE Z790 Eagle AX LGA 1700 Intel Z790 ATX Motherboard with DDR5 in Pakistan Category Specification CPU Support LGA1700 socket: Intel® 14th/13th/12th Gen Core™, Pentium® Gold, Celeron® Chipset Intel® Z790 Express Chipset Memory Support Up to DDR5 7600MHz (OC), 4 DIMMs, Max 256GB, ECC/Non-ECC support, XMP Graphics HDMI 2.1 (4096×2160@60Hz), DisplayPort 1.2 (4096×2304@60Hz) (CPU Dependent) Audio Realtek® Audio CODEC, 7.1-channel, High Definition Audio, S/PDIF Out LAN Realtek® 2.5GbE
